content:
守密人你好：
       彌薩格大學預計於6月30日08:00~11:00（UTC+8）進行校內設施維護。
       維護結束後需要重新登入並更新資源，補給物資將會通過信件向守密人發放。若有任何疑問，歡迎通過校區內客服中心諮詢，感謝您的理解與支持！
    
【補給物資】
停服維護補償：銀芯*200、無垢之芯*5
     
【領取條件】
領取時間截至2025年7月14日09:00。請記得及時前往郵箱領取補給物資哦。
 
【更新內容】
一、活動
【特別幻衣活動：偉大的征服】
● 玩法活動「偉大的征服」將於 6 月 30 日 9:00 - 7 月 14 日 9:00  開放！
    ○ 「偉大的征服」包含 5 個挑戰關卡，活動首日開放 1 個，之後每 2 天開放 1 個。
    ○ 攻略活動獲得的「美味雷歐烤肉」可在「敬獻貢禮」活動商店兌換流明之芯、無垢之芯、賢石碎屑、擬態凝晶、調查徽章、黑色貢物、融蝕之珠等獎勵。
    ○ 活動期間，異夢視界「征廚房記」限時免費開放。異夢視界「征廚房記」限時免費開放
    ○ 以下「簡約幻衣（二期）」永久上架！
        ■ 「阿格里帕·蒼白契約」，價格為「源液」×680。
        ■ 「尤烏哈希·淬血榮冠」，價格為「源液」×680。
    ○  6 月 30 日 9:00 - 7 月 14 日 9:00 期間可使用 簡約幻衣繪形券（二期）兌換以上幻衣，活動結束後恢復原價。
    ○  6 月 30 日 9:00 - 7 月 14 日 9:00 期間，守密人可累計獲得 「簡約幻衣繪形券（二期）」×2。
        ■ 在「學園禮贈」累計 7 日登陸可得 「簡約幻衣繪形券（二期）」×1。
        ■ 參與玩法活動「偉大的征服」並完成全部癲狂難度通關， 即可獲得「簡約幻衣繪形券（二期）」×1。
    ○ 活動期間「餐廳特供」系列精選禮盒限時上架！
 
【異夢視界：征廚房記】
● 「異夢視界」新增篇章「征廚房記」！
    ○ 劇情簡介：一個偉大的時代或許終究會消亡，但那些偉大勇士的意志永遠不會消亡。當新的征途出現，美味的烤肉在那征服之路的盡頭招手，戰士們發起衝鋒，將那榮耀的戰利品收入囊中！
● 通關後，即可解鎖全新鑰令「獵食決心」。
    ○ 鑰令效果：從出戰喚醒體的「技能卡」中發現 3 張，選擇 1 張將其臨時複製置入手中並使其算力消耗降低 1。若當前界域為血肉，可以選擇「一掃而光！」：將全部卡牌的臨時複製置入手中，但不再降低算力消耗。
 
【自選活動喚醒：久遠的呼喚】
● 在  6 月 30 日 9:00 - 7 月 28 日 9:00 期間，以下喚醒活動限時開放！
    ○ 自選活動喚醒「久遠的呼喚」：
        ■ 玩家可在以下喚醒體與對應推薦命輪中任選一組加入自選卡池。
            ● 莉莉、跨越疼痛；「24」、畸體回噬；萊克、好運時間；哈姆林、永恆安魂曲；塔薇、隱世的轉輪；圖魯、神王的頌歌；墨菲、隱秘的誕生；彌利亞姆、虔誠的偉力；索蕾爾、以薔薇之名；薩爾瓦多、神言石板；泰旖絲、慈悲的哺育；血鏈·希洛、沉入殷紅；達芙黛爾、至為珍貴的藏品；旺達、女王的戒律；奧爾拉、詩箋的句尾。
        ■ 選定喚醒體後，選定的SSR喚醒體與推薦命輪的喚醒獲得概率將發生提升。且若獲得喚醒體，則必定是所選喚醒體界域的喚醒體。
        ■ 在本次活動喚醒中，若連續2次喚醒獲取的UP物品相同，則下次通過喚醒獲取的UP必定為另一UP物品。

【特別學園活動：第十九期】
● 在 6 月 30 日 9:00 - 7 月 14 日 9:00 期間，以下學園活動限時開放！本次學園活動為持續 14 天的特殊學園活動。 
● 第十九期「學園禮贈」
● ■ 活動期間累計登錄 7 天即可領取「流明之芯」×10 的豐厚獎勵！累計登錄 14 天可獲得其他「學園禮贈」升級獎勵！
● 第十九期「課題紀錄」
    ○ 本期核心課題·限定頭像：「Q版檔案照：圖魯」、「以銀鑰之名：柯蕾特」。
    ○ 本期核心課題·限定對戰表情：「彌薩格日常：威廉·倒地」、「課餘時間篇：萊克·偵探」、「和平的一天：圖魯·困」、「不高興彌薩格：凱刻斯·受傷」。
    ○ 本期特別課題紀錄期間完成每日任務、每週任務和學期任務可以獲得雙倍的課題經驗。
● 第十九賽季「偉大的征服」 
    ○ 本賽季·限定對戰表情：「課餘時間篇：珊·敲」、「校園生活篇：莉茲·跳舞」、「不高興彌薩格：哈姆林·嫌棄」、「不高興彌薩格：阿格里帕·嘖」。
 
【顱庭輓歌·限時紀行】
● 在 6 月 30 日 9:00 - 8 月 11 日 9:00  期間，「顱庭輓歌·限時紀行」活動限時開放。
● 在 7 月 14  日 9:00前購買「顱庭輓歌·限時紀行」還可額外獲得專屬獎勵限定紀念頭像「永夜的飢餓凝視」！
● 本次限時紀行活動包含 8 個禮包，其中首個禮包可直接免費領取，第 2-8 個禮包需要購買「顱庭輓歌·限時紀行」後方可領取。
● 購買「顱庭輓歌·限時紀行」後可立即領取第 2 個禮包獎勵；後續禮包需要分別在特定時間後才可領取。
● 「顱庭輓歌·限時紀行」購買有時間限制，逾期將無法再購買。請守密人在 8 月 11 日 9:00 前酌情購買
 
二、問題修復和優化調整
● 移除了「界域研習」規則說明中關於「彌利亞姆」「奧爾拉」「泰旖絲」加入「界域研習」常駐喚醒時間的錯誤預告。這些「忘卻篇」限定喚醒體未來仍然會在首次UP滿一年後首次復刻結束後加入「界域研習」常駐喚醒，請屆時關注更新公告。
● 調整了「發現」詞綴的描述以使其更加泛用，對「塔薇」狂氣爆發實際邏輯無影響。
● 修復了部分「靈塑適性」強化預覽界面中沒有改變可升級屬性顏色的問題。
● 新增了「商店」源液購買、「福利」紀行、「禮包」銀輝初耀購買說明：當前展示價格為默認貨幣價格，僅供參考。支付時請以實際貨幣和價格為準。
● 修復了在編隊界面進入角色界面後跳轉素材時出現副本錯誤提示的問題。
● 修復了未解鎖角色時啟靈提升無法預覽的的問題。
● 修復了某些情況下，編隊命輪和密契丟失的問題。
● 優化了語言設置為英語時的以下文本表述問題：
    ○ 優化了9589條喚醒體，命輪，調查事件，詞綴，刻印，造物相關的描述。調查事件，共鳴點，造物的劇情向描述措辭後續將持續優化。
    ○ 優化了喚醒體塔薇、奧爾拉、艾瑞卡、汀克特的部分技能名翻譯，提升可讀性。
    ○ 為V2.2.3異夢視界「征廚房記」增加了人工翻譯。V2.2.3所有新增內容均由人工翻譯校對。
    ○ 跟隨中文相位對弈調整，更新了對應相位對弈模式技能名和效果的英語翻譯。
● 修復了星辰篇第二章「蛻變」、意識潛游「熱情歸塵」錯字問題

三、相位對弈
● 訓練場：
    ○ 修正訓練場中部分與實際戰鬥不一致的問題。
● 機制：
    ○ 修正纏繞詞綴圖標錯誤問題。
    ○ 現在徹底麻了有單獨的圖標。
    ○ 修正徹底麻了狀態的描述與詞綴描述不同的問題。
    ○ 修正隱匿的詞綴與狀態描述不同的問題。
● 喚醒體：
    ○ 卡斯托爾：
        ■ 死亡颶風：算力消耗由 2 降低到 1 ，對敵我所有其他角色造成傷害由 12 降低到 8。
    ○ 奧爾拉：
        ■ 哀慟濃墨：
            ● 舊：增幅本回合下一個詩篇，使其獲得額外效果。
            ● 新：增幅下一個詩篇，使其獲得額外效果。
    ○ 哈姆林：
        ■ 悲愴弱音：
            ● 造成傷害由 8 提升到 10。
    ○ 血鏈·希洛：
        ■ 錘擊之鏈：
            ● 更名為 鏈錘重創。
        ■ 不定之鏈：
            ● 算力消耗由 1 降低到 0。
        ■ 旋動之鏈：
            ● 更名為 旋動鏈條。
● 鑰令：
    ○ 湖畔回眸：傷害由 6 降低到 3。
    ○ 短暫的永恆：傷害由 6 降低到 4。
    ○ 海之祭：降低狂氣由 20 降低至 15。
    ○ 錯位命運：修正效果與描述不符的問題，應為每有敵方陣亡時額外獲得蓄力。
● 命輪：
    ○ 暴食：算力消耗由 2 降低到 1。
    ○ 跨越疼痛：算力消耗由 3 降低到 2。
    ○ 珊瑚女之死：裝備者死亡時造成的額外出血由 9 降低到 6。
    ○ 純銀的初心：獲得護盾由 12 降低到 10。
    ○ 魔女寬檐帽：行動封鎖層數由 6 降低到 5。
    ○ 青石王座：
        ■ 刪除多餘的描述。
        ■ 舊：手牌上限 + 2 。回合結束時，使手牌中裝備者所有「技能」造成的傷害、治療與護盾提高 25%，使用後移除。
        ■ 新：手牌上限 + 2 。回合結束時，使手牌中裝備者所有「技能」造成的傷害、治療與護盾提高 30%。
    ○ 巨人之刃：
        ■ 舊：每回合打出的第一張牌若是自身的「技能」則傷害提高 50%。
        ■ 新：每回合打出的第一張自身的「技能」傷害提高 50%。
    ○ 深海的呼喚：
        ■ 現在擁有深海的呼喚加持的打擊始終會發光。
        ■ 舊：算力消耗3，「打擊」前驅散目標所有正面狀態。
        ■ 新：算力消耗2，「打擊」可以選擇目標，「打擊」前擊退目標所有可驅散的正面狀態到其身後喚醒體。
            ● 擊退正面狀態：若目標背後沒有其他喚醒體，則驅散目標正面狀態。
    ○ 記憶症候：
        ■ 舊：「狂氣爆發」獲得 3 算力。
        ■ 新：「狂氣爆發」獲得 3 算力。回合結束後最多將 3 算力轉換為等量層數的「保留算力」。
            ● 「保留算力」：回合開始時額外獲得等量層數的算力並移除。
    ○ 無法完成的演算：
        ■ 獲得護盾由 20 提升到 25。
    ○ 血肉狂宴：
        ■ 算力消耗從 2 降低到 1。
    ○ 心之壁壘：
        ■ 舊：「狂氣爆發」使全體友方獲得 15 護盾。
        ■ 新：「狂氣爆發」使全體友方獲得 15 護盾並驅散一半出血效果。

○ 隱沒的痛楚：
        ■ 舊：回合結束時對對手手中隨機 1 張指令卡賦予虛無，裝備時對對手手中所有指令卡賦予虛無。
        ■ 新：裝備時和回合結束時，賦予對手的隨機 1 張手牌 12 層「隱沒的痛楚」。
            ● 隱沒的痛楚：此牌打出後為前排敵方施加等量層數護盾。
    ○ 至為珍貴的藏品：
        ■ 舊：每有 1 個陣亡友方，強效+ 3，裝備時昏迷自身。
        ■ 新：裝備時獲得 10 護盾 和 纏繞。每有 1 個陣亡友方，強效+ 3。
    ○ 快樂魔法秀：
        ■ 舊：算力消耗 2 ，「狂氣爆發」前使雙方棄掉所有手牌抽取等量 + 1 張數的牌。
        ■ 新：算力消耗 1 ，「狂氣爆發」前使雙方棄掉所有手牌抽取等量張數的牌。
    ○ 職責所在：
        ■ 舊：「狂氣爆發」使其他友方獲得 25 狂氣。
        ■ 新：「狂氣爆發」使其他友方獲得 25 狂氣，此效果溢出的狂氣將折半返還給裝備者。
    ○ 專注精神：
        ■ 修正「珊」的「無盡的雕琢」丟棄時機靠後導致其在獲得減少算力效果後立即被丟棄的問題。
        ■ 新：獲得預備。
    ○ 神言石板：
        ■ 算力消耗由 2 降低到 1
    ○ 阿庫特之春：
        ■ 舊：回合結束時獲得 50 狂氣。
        ■ 新：回合結束時獲得 40% 缺失的狂氣，成長 10%。
            ● 成長：根據戰鬥當前的回合數獲得對應增強。
    ○ 隕日：
        ■ 舊：「打擊」「技能」「狂氣爆發」造成的傷害、治療與護盾提高 25%。
        ■ 新：「打擊」「技能」「狂氣爆發」造成的傷害、治療與護盾提高 10%，成長 5%。
            ● 成長：根據戰鬥當前的回合數獲得對應增強。
    ○ 隱秘的誕生：
        ■ 舊：算力消耗1，回合結束時，若有剩餘算力，自身獲得15狂氣，每有1剩餘算力就使其提高5。
        ■ 新：消耗算力1，回合結束時自身獲得10狂氣，每有 1 剩餘算力就使其提高10。
    ○ 永不停歇的演奏：
        ■ 修正手牌已滿後依舊會扣除狂氣並生成「小小心願」並丟棄的問題。
        ■ 舊：算力消耗 1，回合結束時，若自身狂氣不低於 20 點則扣除 20 點並獲得一張「小小心願」。
        ■ 新：算力消耗 2，回合結束時，扣除 20 狂氣並獲得一張「小小心願」，若狂氣不足以扣除則獲得 10 狂氣。
    ○ 永恆安魂曲
        ■ 舊：「狂氣爆發」前對全體敵人造成 1 層遲緩。
        ■ 新：「狂氣爆發」前對全體敵人造成 1 層遲緩和 5 出血傷害。
    ○ 不可承受的自由
        ■ 現在現在護盾狀態不再錯誤顯示護盾值，並且獲得的蓄力不再超過 10 層上限。

V2.2.3.0 Maintenance Notice

Dear Keeper,
    Mythag University will undergo facility maintenance on June 30 from 08:00 to 11:00 (UTC+8).
    After maintenance, you will need to log in again and update resources. Supplies will be sent via mail. For any questions, please contact the campus customer service center. Thank you for your understanding and support!

【Supplies】
Maintenance Compensation:  Silver*200, Pure Core*5

【Claim Conditions】
Claim period ends on July 14, 2025, at 09:00. Please remember to collect your supplies from the mailbox in time.

【Update Content】
1. Event
[Special Skin Event: The Great Conquering] 
● Gameplay event "The Great Conquering" will be available from 9:00 on June 30 - 9:00 on July 14!
    ○ "The Great Conquering" contains 5 challenge stages, with 1 stage opening on the first day and 1 new stage opening every 2 days afterward.
    ○ Complete event challenges to earn "Leonian Barbecue", which can be exchanged for rewards such as Luminous Core, Pure Core, Aetheric Shard, Mimetic Crystal, Investigation Badge, Black Offering, D-Jewel, and more at the "Offer Tribute" event shop.
    ○ During the event period, Dreamscape "Culinary Conquership" will be temporarily free to access. Dreamscape "Culinary Conquership" is temporarily free to access.
    ○ The following "Basic Skin: 2nd Edition" will be permanently listed:
        ■ "Agrippa: Pallid Covenant", priced at Silver Prime ×680.
        ■ "Uvhash: Bloodforged Diadem", priced at Silver Prime ×680.
    ○ From 9:00 on June 30 - 9:00 on July 14, you may use Basic Skin Voucher: 2nd Edition to purchase the above skins. After the event ends, they will return to their original price.

○ From 9:00 on June 30 - 9:00 on July 14, Keepers can accumulate a total of Basic Skin Voucher: 2nd Edition ×2.
        ■ Log in for 7 consecutive days in "Gifts from Mythag" to receive Basic Skin Voucher: 2nd Edition ×1.
        ■ Participate in the gameplay event "The Great Conquering" and complete all Insane difficulty clears to receive Basic Skin Voucher: 2nd Edition ×1.
    ○ During the event, selected limited-time bundles from the "Diner Special" series will be temporarily listed!
 
[Dreamscape: Culinary Conquership]
● New chapter "Culinary Conquership" added to Dreamscape!
    ○ Story Summary: While a great era may eventually fade away, the spirits of those brave warriors shall never perish. When a new journey appears, delicious barbecue awaits at the end of the conquering path, calling warriors to charge forward and claim glorious spoils!
● Upon completion, unlock the new Posse "Predatory Resolve".
    ○ Posse Effect: Discover 3 cards from the "Skill Cards" of your deployed Awakener, choose 1 to temporarily copy into your hand and reduce its Arithmetica Cost by 1. If the current Realm is Caro, you may instead choose "Clean Sweep!": Temporarily copy all cards into your hand, but no longer reducing Arithmetica Cost.

[Self-Select Event Awakening: The Timeless Call]
● From 9:00 on June 30 - 9:00 on July 28, the following Awakening Events will be temporarily available!
    ○ Self-Select Event Awakening "The Timeless Call":
        ■ Players may select one group from the following Awakeners and their recommended Wheels of Destiny to add to the self-select pool.
            ● Lily, Grace Through Pain; "24", Aberrant Devour; Ryker, Hour of Fortune; Hameln, Eternal Requiem; Tawil, Wheel Unseen; Tulu, Hymn of the Sovereign; Murphy, Shrouded Birth; Miryam, Power of the Pious; Sorel, By Rose Alone; Salvador, Tablet of Scriptures; Thais, Merciful Nurturing; Chain: Helot, Drowning in Crimson; Daffodil, Treasured Rarity; Wanda, Queen's Edict; Horla, The Last Verse.
        ■ After selecting an Awakener, the drop rate of both the selected SSR Awakener and its recommended Wheel of Destiny will be increased. Additionally, if you obtain an Awakener, it will definitely belong to the Realm of your selected Awakener.
        ■ In this Event Awakening, if you acquire the same UP item twice in a row, the next UP item obtained through Awakening will definitely be the other UP item.

[Special Academy Event: Season 19]
● From 9:00 on June 30 - 9:00 on July 14, the following academy events will be available for a limited time! This is a special academy event lasting 14 days.
●Season 19 "Gifts from Mythag"
    ○ Log in cumulatively for 7 days during the event to receive a generous reward of 10 Luminous Cores! Log in cumulatively for 14 days to obtain additional upgraded rewards from "Gifts from Mythag"!
●Season 19 "Curriculum"
    ○ Current Premium Topics · Limited Avatar: "Chibi Mug Shot: Tulu", "In the Name of Silver Key: Colette".
    ○ Current Premium Topics · Limited Traphase Emote: "Mythag Daily: William: Defeated", "After School: Ryker: Detective", "Peaceful Day: Tulu: Sleepy", "Unhappy Mythag: Caecus: Injured".
    ○ During this special Curriculum period, completing Daily Tasks, Weekly Tasks, and Semester Tasks grants double curriculum experience.
●Season 19 "The Great Conquering"
    ○ This season's limited Traphase Emotes: "After School: Sanga: BONK!", "School Life: Liz: Dancing", "Unhappy Mythag: Hameln: Eww", "Unhappy Mythag: Agrippa: Tsk".
 
[Ossuary Antiphon · Time-Limited Journey]
● The "Ossuary Antiphon · Time-Limited Journey" event will be available from 9:00 on June 30 - 9:00 on August 11.
● Purchase the "Ossuary Antiphon · Time-Limited Journey" before 9:00 on July 14 to additionally receive the exclusive commemorative avatar "Evernight's Hunger"!
● This time-limited journey includes 8 packages. The first package can be claimed for free directly; Packages 2-8 are only available after purchasing the "Ossuary Antiphon · Time-Limited Journey".
● Purchasing the "Ossuary Antiphon · Time-Limited Journey" allows immediate claiming of the second package; subsequent packages must be claimed at specific times.
● There is a time limit to purchase the "Ossuary Antiphon · Time-Limited Journey". It will no longer be available after the deadline. Please consider your purchase before 9:00 on August 11.

II. Bug Fixes and Optimizations
● Removed incorrect announcements regarding "Miryam," "Horla," and "Thais" joining the permanent Awakener pool in "Realms Research" from the rule description of "Realms Research." These "Faded Legacy"-exclusive Awakeners will still join the permanent Awakener pool in "Realms Research" after their first rerun one year after their initial UP release. Please stay tuned for updates.
● Adjusted the description of the "Discover" affix to make it more universally applicable. This change has no impact on the actual logic of "Tawil's" Aliemus.
● Fixed an issue where colors of upgradable attributes did not update properly in some "Soulforge Aptitude" enhancement preview interfaces.
● Added descriptions for "Shop" Silver Prime purchases, "Welfare" Journey, and "Pack" Argent Dawnlight purchases: The displayed price is the default currency price for reference only. Please confirm the actual currency and price when making payments.
● Fixed an issue where duplicate error messages appeared when navigating to material interfaces from the character interface within the Lineup screen.
● Fixed an issue where Enlighten progression could not be previewed when characters were not yet unlocked.
● Fixed an issue where Destiny Wheel and Covenant data might be lost under certain conditions.

● Localization Fixes and Improvements (English Language Setting):
    ○ Refined descriptions for 9,589 gameplay entries, including:
        ■ Awakener skill descriptions
        ■ Wheel of Destiny mechanics
        ■ Investigation Events
        ■ Affixes, Orisons, and Relics
        ■ Ongoing refinements for the story-related content in Investigation Events, Resonance Points, and Relic descriptions will follow in future updates
    ○ Improved skill name translations for Awakeners Tawil, Horla, Erica, and Tinct for better readability.
    ○ Added full human translation for all V2.2.3 new content, including Dreamscape: Culinary Conquership, new skins, new events, and other mischellaneous content.
    ○ Updated Traphase mode skill names and effect translations to align with recent balance adjustments.
● Fixed typos in "Metamorphosis" (Chapter 2 of Astral Reign) and "Passion to Dust" (Psyche Deepdive)

III. Traphase
● Training Ground:
    ○ Fixed inconsistencies between the training ground and actual combat.
● Mechanics:
    ○ Fixed the icon error for the Entwined affix.
    ○ "Entirely Paralyzed" now has its own dedicated icon.
    ○ Fixed discrepancies between the description and effect of the "Entirely Paralyzed" status.
    ○ Fixed discrepancies between the description and effect of the "Hidden" affix.
● Awakener:
    ○ Castor:
        ■ Storm of the Entombed: Arithmetica cost reduced from 2 to 1, damage to all other characters (both sides) reduced from 12 to 8.
    ○ Horla:
        ■ Grieving Ink:
            ● Old: Enhances this round's next poem, granting it additional effects.
            ● New: Enhances the next poem, granting it additional effects.
    ○ Hameln:
        ■ Melancholy Tone:
            ● Damage increased from 8 to 10.
    ○ Helot: Catena:
        ■ Hammerstrike Chain:
            ● Renamed to Hammerstrike.
        ■ Chain of Uncertainty:
            ● Arithmetica cost reduced from 1 to 0.
        ■ Rotating Chain:
            ● Renamed to Spinning Chains.

● Posse:
    ○ Lakeside Glimpse: Damage reduced from 6 to 3.
    ○ Ephemeral Eternity: Damage reduced from 6 to 4.
    ○ Festival of Tides: Aliemus reduction decreased from 20 to 15.
    ○ Derision of Destiny: Fixed inconsistency between effect and description; should grant Charge whenever an enemy dies.
● Wheel of Destiny:
    ○ Gluttony: Arithmetica cost reduced from 2 to 1.
    ○ Grace Through Pain: Arithmetica cost reduced from 3 to 2.
    ○ Death of Ms. Coral: Extra Bleed dealt upon wielder's death reduced from 9 to 6.
    ○ Heart of Silver: Shield gained reduced from 12 to 10.
    ○ Witch's Wide-brimmed Hat: Action Lock stacks reduced from 6 to 5.
    ○ Blue Stone Throne:
        ■ Removed redundant description.
        ■ Old: Maximum hand size +2. At the end of the turn, increase damage, healing, and shielding of all "Skills" in the wielder's hand by 25%, then remove after use.
        ■ New: Maximum hand size +2. At the end of the turn, increase damage, healing, and shielding of all "Skills" in the wielder's hand by 30%.
    ○ Blade of the Titan:
        ■ Old: If the first card played this turn is a "Skill", increase its damage by 50%.
        ■ New: The first "Skill" played each turn deals 50% more damage.
    ○ Deep Sea's Call:
        ■ Attacks enhanced by "Deep Sea's Call" will now always glow.
        ■ Old: Arithmetica cost 3, "Strike" dispels all positive statuses from the target beforehand.
        ■ New: Arithmetica cost 2, "Strike" can select targets, and pushes back all dispellable positive statuses of the target to the Awakener behind it.
            ● Push Back Positive Statuses: If there are no other Awakeners behind the target, simply dispel the target's positive statuses.

○ Memory Syndrome:
        ■ Old: "Aliemus Burst" grants 3 Arithmetica.
        ■ New: "Aliemus Burst" grants 3 Arithmetica. At the end of the turn, up to 3 Arithmetica can be converted into an equal number of stacks of "Retained Arithmetica."
            ● Retained Arithmetica: At the start of the turn, gain an equal amount of Arithmetica and then removed.
    ○ Incalculable Factor:
        ■ Shield gained increased from 20 to 25.
    ○ Bloody Feast:
        ■ Arithmetica cost reduced from 2 to 1.
    ○ Mind Barrier:
        ■ Old: "Aliemus Burst" grants all allies 15 Shield.
        ■ New: "Aliemus Burst" grants all allies 15 Shield and dispels half of their Bleed effects.
    ○ Veiled Anguish:
        ■ Old: At the end of the turn, inflicts Void on 1 random Command Card in the opponent's hand. When equipped, inflicts Void on all Command Cards in the opponent's hand.
        ■ New: When equipped and at the end of the turn, applies 12 stacks of "Veiled Anguish" to a random card in the opponent's hand.
            ● Veiled Anguish: When this card is played, grants the front enemy an equal number of stacks of Shield.
    ○ Treasured Rarity:
        ■ Old: For every fallen ally, gains +3 Amplification, and self Faints upon equipping.
        ■ New: Gains 10 Shield and Entwined upon equipping. For every fallen ally, gains +3 Amplification.
    ○ Happy Magic Show:
        ■ Old: Arithmetica cost 2, before "Aliemus Burst," both players discard all cards in hand and draw an equal number +1 new cards.
        ■ New: Arithmetica cost 1, before "Aliemus Burst," both players discard all cards in hand and draw an equal number of new cards.

○ Duty's Gravitas:
        ■ Old: "Aliemus Burst" grants other allies 25 Aliemus.
        ■ New: "Aliemus Burst" grants other allies 25 Aliemus. Overflow Aliemus is halved and returned to the wielder.
    ○ Elevated Focus:
        ■ Fixed issue where "Sanga's" "Endless Refinement" discarded too late, causing it to be discarded immediately after gaining reduced Arithmetica.
        ■ New: Gains Prepare.
    ○ Tablet of Scriptures:
        ■ Arithmetica cost reduced from 2 to 1.
    ○ Spring in Acushnet:
        ■ Old: Gains 50 Aliemus at the end of the turn.
        ■ New: Gains 40% of missing Aliemus at the end of the turn, with 10% Growth.
            ● Growth: Increases based on the current turn number in battle.
    ○ Sunfall:
        ■ Old: Increases damage, healing, and shielding from "Strike," "Skill," and "Aliemus Burst" by 25%.
        ■ New: Increases damage, healing, and shielding from "Strike," "Skill," and "Aliemus Burst" by 10%, with 5% Growth.
            ● Growth: Increases based on the current turn number in battle.
    ○ Shrouded Birth:
        ■ Old: Arithmetica cost 1, at the end of the turn, if any Arithmetica remains, gains 15 Aliemus plus 5 per remaining Arithmetica.
        ■ New: Arithmetica cost 1, at the end of the turn, gains 10 Aliemus plus 10 per remaining Arithmetica.
    ○ Never-Ending Performance:
        ■ Fixed issue where Aliemus was still consumed and "Tiny Wish" created and discarded even when hand was full.
        ■ Old: Arithmetica cost 1, at the end of the turn, if own Aliemus is at least 20, subtract 20 and gain one "Tiny Wish."
        ■ New: Arithmetica cost 2, at the end of the turn, subtract 20 Aliemus and gain one "Tiny Wish," or gain 10 Aliemus if insufficient.

○ Eternal Requiem:
        ■ Old: Before "Aliemus Burst," inflicts 1 stack of Stagnation on all enemies.
        ■ New: Before "Aliemus Burst," inflicts 1 stack of Stagnation and 5 Bleed damage on all enemies.
    ○ Unbearable Freedom:
        ■ Shields now correctly display their values, and gained Charges no longer exceed the 10-stack limit.

○ 青石王座：
        ■ 刪除多餘的描述。
        ■ 舊：手牌上限 + 2 。回合結束時，使手牌中裝備者所有「技能」造成的傷害、治療與護盾提高 25%，使用後移除。
        ■ 新：手牌上限 + 2 。回合結束時，使手牌中裝備者所有「技能」造成的傷害、治療與護盾提高 30%。
